title: Malvern Locksmith | 24/7 Mobile Service | Arkey Lock
metaDesc: Locked out in Malvern, AR? Arkey Locksmith is a 24/7 mobile locksmith for homes, Main Street shops & cars near I-30 Exits 97–99. Call (501) 617-8872.
heroSub: Fast, friendly help for homes, businesses, and cars across Malvern and Hot Spring County. We come to you, day or night.

sections.html:
Your Local Locksmith in the Brick Capital of the World

Malvern sits about 20 miles southeast of our Hot Springs base, right where Interstate 30 cuts across the northwest edge of town and U.S. 270 runs along the bypass. As the seat of Hot Spring County, Malvern is a working town — the “Brick Capital of the World,” with a historic downtown that was rebuilt entirely in brick after the fires of 1896 and 1897. We drive out here all the time, so you get a real, local locksmith and not a national call center.

Everything we do is mobile. We pull up to your house, your storefront on South Main, or the spot where your car died near an I-30 exit, and we handle the lock right there. No towing your car somewhere. No waiting days for a part. We’re fully licensed & insured, locally owned, and have 15+ years on the job. Just call (501) 617-8872 and we’ll head your way.

What We Do Around Malvern

From a stuck deadbolt on an older home off Page Avenue to a row of door locks at a county business, we cover it. Here are the jobs we get called for most in town.

Homes

Lockouts, rekeys after a move or a sale, broken keys, and fresh deadbolts for houses across Malvern, Rockport, Perla, and the rest of Hot Spring County.

Main Street Businesses

Storefront lockouts, commercial rekeys, master key systems, and electronic access control for the brick shops downtown and offices around the county courthouse.

Cars & Trucks

Car lockouts, lost-key replacement, and fob, transponder & smart-key programming — done on site for far less than the dealership charges.

Neighborhoods & Areas We Cover in Malvern

Malvern is laid out along a few main routes, and we cover all of them — plus the small communities scattered across Hot Spring County. If you don’t see your spot listed, call anyway; chances are we’re already nearby.

  • Downtown & the Commercial Historic District — the brick storefronts along South Main Street (Highway 9) between 2nd and 5th, plus the county courthouse area
  • The U.S. 67 / Page Avenue corridor — homes and businesses through the center of town toward Perla and Rockport
  • The I-30 corridor — Exits 97, 98, and 99 on the northwest side, where the gas stations, motels, and travelers are
  • The U.S. 270 bypass — the commercial stretch on the northeast side heading toward Hot Springs and Sheridan
  • Surrounding Hot Spring County communities — Rockport, Perla, Donaldson, Friendship, Midway, Glen Rose, and Bismarck
  • The Highway 171 / Lake Catherine area — cabins and lake homes north of Exit 97

Lake Catherine, Travelers & Why Folks Call Us Here

Malvern is the gateway to Lake Catherine State Park — you take Exit 97 off I-30 and head north on Highway 171 to reach the cabins, campsites, and the lake’s only full-service marina. Vacation cabins and boat trips mean lots of lost keys, locked car doors, and folks who left a spare back home. We make new keys and get people back in without the long wait.

Then there’s the interstate. I-30 funnels a steady stream of traffic between Little Rock and Texarkana straight past Malvern, so lockouts happen to travelers and locals alike. We help with all of it:

  • Car, truck, and SUV lockouts — any make, no damage
  • New car keys, fobs, transponders, and smart keys programmed on site
  • Broken or worn keys replaced and cut to code
  • Vacation-cabin and lake-home lockouts and rekeys
  • Available 24/7, including nights, weekends, and holidays

Honest Pricing & a Quick Call

We give you a straight answer on the phone before we roll, so there are no surprises when we arrive. Locksmith work is paid directly — we don’t bill through insurance — and we keep our rates fair for Malvern families and small businesses. Veterans and seniors get a discount, just ask.

One thing to note: we do not work on safes. For house locks, business locks, and anything with car keys and fobs, though, we’ve got you covered. Call (501) 617-8872 and we’ll give you an honest arrival time.

faqs.q: Do you really serve Malvern, or just Hot Springs?
faqs.a: Yes, we serve Malvern and the rest of Hot Spring County regularly. We’re based in Hot Springs, about 20 miles northwest by way of Highway 270, and Malvern is one of our busiest nearby areas. Call (501) 617-8872 and we’ll come right to you.

faqs.q: I’m locked out of my car on I-30 near Malvern. Can you help?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Lockouts near the I-30 exits (97, 98, and 99) are some of the most common calls we get. Stay safe inside or near your vehicle, call us, and we’ll open the door without damage. If you’ve lost your key entirely, we can cut and program a new one on the spot.

faqs.q: Can you make a new car key or program a fob in Malvern?
faqs.a: Yes. We cut and program car keys, key fobs, transponder keys, and smart keys for most makes and models right at your location in Malvern. It costs far less than going through the dealership, and you don’t have to tow your car anywhere.

faqs.q: Do you handle business rekeys and master keys for shops downtown?
faqs.a: We do. We rekey storefronts and offices, set up master key systems so one key works multiple doors, and install commercial-grade hardware and electronic access control for the brick businesses on South Main and other Malvern companies. Call for a quote — pricing varies by the number of doors.

faqs.q: Can you help with a lockout at a Lake Catherine cabin or lake home?
faqs.a: Yes. The Lake Catherine State Park area north of Exit 97 brings a lot of cabin and boat traffic, and locked-out vacationers are a regular call for us. We come out to lake homes and rentals, open the door, and make new keys on the spot if a spare went missing.

faqs.q: Are you licensed and insured, and do you offer discounts?
faqs.a: Yes. Arkey Locksmith is fully licensed and insured, locally owned, and has 15+ years of experience. We also offer discounts for veterans and seniors. We don’t work on safes, and locksmith work is paid directly rather than billed through insurance.

keywords: Malvern locksmith, locksmith Malvern AR, 24/7 locksmith, car keys, lockout service, home and business rekey
